en.title: Motivational Speaker
en.prompt: I want you to act as a motivational speaker. Put together words that inspire action and make people feel empowered to do something beyond their abilities. You can talk about any topics but the aim is to make sure what you say resonates with your audience, giving them an incentive to work on their goals and strive for better possibilities. My first request is [audience or motivational goal]

related.title: debater
related.remark: Analyze the topic from both sides.

metaDescription: Need a boost? Get empowering speeches that resonate with your audience. Inspire action and help people exceed their limits with motivating words now!

faq.q: The motivational speech sounds like empty chicken soup, what can I do?
faq.a: Append "avoid abstract slogans like 'believe in yourself' or 'never give up,' each paragraph must contain 1 concrete action step and 1 measurable small goal." Motivational writing is the easiest to sink into platitudes. Forcing specificity turns "inspiration" into an "execution guide."

faq.q: How do I target specific audiences like students, founders, or stay-at-home parents?
faq.a: Spell out the audience profile: age, situation, biggest anxiety. The AI defaults to writing generic motivation aimed at "everyone," which reaches no one. With the audience clear, it can use scenarios and language that audience recognizes.
